prompt: A hyper-realistic macro shot of a delicate porcelain teacup sitting on a wooden table. Instead of tea, the cup contains an entire spiral galaxy with glowing nebulae, orbiting planets, tiny astronauts floating between stars, and miniature comets streaking across space. The swirling galaxy reflects on the rim of the cup. Cinematic lighting, impossible object, photorealistic, masterpiece, 8K.
promptEn: A hyper-realistic macro shot of a delicate porcelain teacup sitting on a wooden table. Instead of tea, the cup contains an entire spiral galaxy with glowing nebulae, orbiting planets, tiny astronauts floating between stars, and miniature comets streaking across space. The swirling galaxy reflects on the rim of the cup. Cinematic lighting, impossible object, photorealistic, masterpiece, 8K.
promptZh: 一张超写实的微距摄影作品，拍摄对象是放置在 木桌 上的 精致瓷杯。杯中盛放的不是茶，而是 整个螺旋星系，包含发光的星云、环绕的行星、在星际间漂浮的微型宇航员，以及划过太空的微型彗星。旋转的星系倒映在杯沿上。电影级光效，不可能的物体，照片级真实感，杰作，8K 分辨率。
